caption: The video features a presentation at EuroPython 2018 in Edinburgh, focusing on "Industrial Machine Learning." The speaker, Alejandro Saucedo, is introduced as the CTO of Exponential Technologies, Chairman of The Institute for Ethical AI & ML, a Fellow (AI, Data & ML) at The RSA, and an Advisor for TeensInAI.com initiative. He stands behind a podium, addressing the audience with a confident demeanor. The slide displayed behind him highlights his credentials and provides contact information, emphasizing his expertise and involvement in various technological and ethical initiatives related to artificial intelligence and machine learning. The setting suggests a professional and educational environment aimed at sharing knowledge and insights in the field of industrial machine learning.
